title: Whole Cloth
description: Shakes up progression with cloth scraps, adding a new resource and colorful building blocks!
body: ## Overview This mod adds cloth scraps as a new resource dropped by various mobs such as zombies, strays, and piglins. Cloth scraps may also show up in certain loot pools, such as shipwrecks or small dungeons. Whole Cloth also changes the game's primary progression through requiring cloth scraps in crafting beds. Using these scraps, players can craft a host of decorative blocks such as cloth and carpet blocks. Cloth blocks, like wool, dampen and occlude sculk vibrations. ## Compatibility Using knives from [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) can "scavenge" additional cloth scraps from certain mobs. Cloth blocks can also be used as windmill sails in [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create). ## License [![Code license (MIT)](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20license-MIT-green.svg?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/davigj/whole-cloth/blob/main/LICENSE.txt) Whole Cloth is available under the open source MIT License. Note that this means you are required to attribute the mod if you use any content from it in your own projects. ## Credits Feel free to direct any suggestions towards the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/wholecloth/issues)! This mod's features were first implemented as an original feature for Raspberry Flavoured, inspired by BTA. It was iterated on there before being extracted into its own mod. Cloth scrap implementation was done by [Raspmary](https://modrinth.com/user/raspmary) and [NCP Bails](https://modrinth.com/user/NCP_Bails). The item texture is by [noelledotjpg](https://modrinth.com/user/noelledotjpg), with cloth block textures by Derb and jaybees.
